title: Hugh Balcomb, Joan Balcomb, Colin Balcomb and Alan Balcomb trading as Norman Balcomb and Son (NPS/WR/041603): application made to abstract water
body: "The Environment Agency consult the public on certain applications for the abstraction and impoundment of water.  These notices explain:    what the application is about   which Environment Agency offices you can visit to see the application documents on the public register   when you need to comment by   "
